sentence_reviews.text: Sim-to-real methods train or validate in simulation and transfer behavior to physical systems, often using real-to-sim calibration or residual adaptation to close the reality gap.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: They reduce the cost and danger of physical interaction while preserving a route to deployment.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Zhao et al. 2020 abstract: real-world data collection has sample inefficiency, cost, and safety concerns; simulation provides potentially infinite data and alleviates safety concerns.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported by the inspected sim-to-real survey abstract.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Zhao et al. 2020 title/abstract: robotics and policy transfer to real robots; Tobin et al. 2017 abstract: object localization stepping stone to robotic manipulation and grasping in clutter.
